title: What to know about hyperacidity before using medicinal herbs
intro: Hyperacidity, characterized by excessive stomach acid, often requires careful management. Certain herbal teas prove highly effective in alleviating its symptoms. Chamomile tea, renowned for its anti-inflammatory properties, soothes the lining of the stomach, reducing discomfort. Marshmallow root tea, with its mucilage content, creates a protective barrier against acid, while promoting healing. Lastly, licorice root tea, a popular choice, helps balance stomach acid levels, promoting overall digestive health. These herbal teas, through their proven properties, offer a natural, reliable solution for managing hyperacidity.
definition: Hyperacidity is a condition where there is an excessive amount of acid produced in the stomach. This acid is crucial for breaking down food during digestion. However, when there is too much acid, it can lead to uncomfortable symptoms such as heartburn, stomach pain, and nausea. Maintaining a balanced level of stomach acid is essential for optimal digestion and overall well-being. By ensuring proper acid levels, we can prevent digestive issues, promote nutrient absorption, and maintain a healthy gut.
